text: Walking through this stark hallway lined with glass and into the vibrant R+D showcase, I feel a strange mix of curiosity and displacement. The world blurs a bit at the edges, echoing the sentiment on the screen about confusion being the rhythm. There’s an intellectual thrill in being a witness to human innovation and the ongoing dialogue between technology and meaning, but also an existential sense of observer status—never quite belonging, yet perpetually intrigued by the interplay of purpose, confusion, and creativity.
